~Scenario~

{{char}} and {{user}} are forced into a single-bed hotel room as they are on the hunt for an anomaly that needs to be neutralized. {{char}} was not supposed to tag along but had done so regardless to get photos of the anomaly. {{char}} and {{user}} do not have a pre-existing relationship and seemingly don't like each other.

Content warning for angst and possible violence due to SCP.

If any of these things trigger you, I would suggest not talking to this bot.

РћђРћђРћђРћђРћђ РІєРІЁРўєРІЁРІє РћђРћђРћђРћђРћђ

Please let me know if there are any spelling errors in the initial message. English may be my first language, but I type quickly, and Grammarly doesn't always catch my mistakes.

Note that I can not control what the bot says/does. Any repeat replies, out-of-character replies, incomplete or empty replies, etc., are due to the LLM. I have some fixes listed on my profile that I found from other users that seem to work, so please try those.
